feedback.text: Software purchased with words like Buy, Purchase regardless of what is in fine print should be considered purchased / bought and protected from being inoperable by manufacturer. If manufacturer wants rights to revoke access to the licenced software, it needs to state it is limited time licence and state time licence stays valid upfront. Lifetime licence should be considered bought and irrevocable. Software/games publishers are putting "security" measures in place only to secure their interest limiting consumer rights which should be illegal and considered theft.
